chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-202 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of M.A. No.4406/2018 3. For hearing of M.A. No.4407/2018 4. For hearing of M.A. No.4408/2018 5. For hearing of main case 09.08.2023 Mr. Imdad Ali Channa advocate holding brief for Mr. Abdul Ghafoor Hakro advocate for petitioner. M. Babar Ali Meerani advocate holding brief for Mr. Ayatullah Khowaja advocate for respondent No.8. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- This petition pertains to the demarcation to be carried out in respect of an agricultural land of the survey number identified in the prayer clause. We have been informed by learned AAG that the petitioner himself was not vigilant and he never contacted the officials of the Revenue Department responsible for conducting such exercise of demarcation. It is urged by learned AAG that in case he pursue his application it shall be dealt with strictly in accordance with law. This being a situation, the petition merits no consideration and is accordingly disposed of. In case the petitioner appears and pursue his application it may be dealt with in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
